title: 'Achiytuwb #0285
definition:
Ahitub = "my brother is good (goodness)"

 1) a grandson of Eli
 2) the father of Zadok the priest
nasbUsage:
Definition: Ahitub = "my brother is good (goodness)"

 1) a grandson of Eli
 2) the father of Zadok the priest

    NASB:  my brother is goodness, two Isr.
